name: source_fingerprint
value: PropellerArchiveSourceFingerprint identifies the external archive and entry hashes before reviewed import.

value: PropellerArchiveDatasetTriage supplies current candidate domains static anchors and geometry availability.

name: curve_fit_plan
value: PropellerArchiveCurveFitPlan defines CT CP eta static and geometry curve families.

name: compact_reference_handoff
value: PropellerArchiveCompactReferenceHandoff controls whether compact reference material may be exported.

value: Compact reference table never enables runtime coupling or gameplay auto-apply.
